title: Jonathan Oldfield Work In Progress
description: Multi award-winning character comedian Jonathan Oldfield is making his debut comedy hour. Creator and star of BBC Radio 4’s Time of the Week (winner of Best Sketch Show at British Comedy Guide Awards) and BBC New Comedy Awards Finalist. He’s also directed people like Lorna Rose Treen, Joe Kent-Walters, Alice Cockayne and Lucy Pearman. And you may have seen him on Disney+ in Star Wars: Andor or online in those sketches that someone sent to you.

venue.name: WundaBarn at The SpiegelGardens
venue.address: Victoria Gardens, Brighton and Hove, East Sussex
